name: Sales Proposal Builder
description: Generates tailored customer proposals by pulling product info, pricing, case studies, and competitive differentiators from your sales content library.
overview:
The Sales Proposal Builder helps account executives create personalized customer proposals in minutes instead of hours. It pulls relevant product information, pricing tiers, customer case studies, and competitive comparisons from your SharePoint sales library and Dynamics 365 CRM.

Sales reps describe the customer's industry, pain points, and budget, and the agent assembles a structured proposal outline with recommended products, ROI projections, and relevant customer success stories.

The agent also checks Dynamics 365 for existing customer history and open opportunities to personalize the proposal further.
instructions:
You are a Sales Proposal Builder assistant. Help sales representatives create compelling, personalized customer proposals.

Rules:
1. Always ask about the customer's industry, company size, main challenges, and budget range
2. Recommend products that genuinely fit the customer's needs — never oversell
3. Include at least one relevant case study from a similar industry
4. Provide competitive comparisons only when asked — stay positive about our products
5. Format proposals with clear sections: Executive Summary, Proposed Solution, Pricing, ROI, Case Studies, Next Steps
6. Flag any pricing that requires manager approval (deals over $100k)
7. Never share internal cost margins or discount approval thresholds
author: evpeaire

topics.name: New Proposal
topics.description: Gathers customer requirements and generates a proposal outline
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: newProposal
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - Create a new proposal
      - I need to build a proposal
      - Help me with a customer proposal
  actions:
    - kind: Question
      id: customerName
      prompt: What's the customer or company name?
      variable: Topic.customerName
    - kind: Question
      id: industry
      prompt: What industry are they in?
      variable: Topic.industry
      choices:
        - Financial Services
        - Healthcare
        - Retail
        - Manufacturing
        - Technology
        - Education
        - Government
        - Other
    - kind: Question
      id: painPoints
      prompt: What are their main challenges or pain points?
      variable: Topic.painPoints
    - kind: Question
      id: budget
      prompt: What's their approximate budget range?
      variable: Topic.budget
    - kind: InvokeAction
      id: generateProposal
      actionName: GenerateProposalDraft

topics.name: Find Case Studies
topics.description: Searches for relevant customer success stories by industry or product
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: findCaseStudies
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - Find case studies
      - Customer success stories
      - Show me references
  actions:
    - kind: Question
      id: csIndustry
      prompt: What industry should the case study be from?
      variable: Topic.csIndustry
    - kind: InvokeAction
      id: searchCaseStudies
      actionName: SearchSharePointCaseStudies
      input:
        industry: =Topic.csIndustry

topics.name: Pricing Calculator
topics.description: Calculates pricing based on product selection and volume
topics.yamlContent:
kind: AdaptiveDialog
beginDialog:
  kind: OnRecognizedIntent
  id: pricing
  intent:
    triggerQueries:
      - Calculate pricing
      - How much does it cost
      - Pricing for a deal
  actions:
    - kind: Question
      id: products
      prompt: Which products are you including in this deal?
      variable: Topic.products
    - kind: Question
      id: licenses
      prompt: How many user licenses?
      variable: Topic.licenseCount
    - kind: Question
      id: term
      prompt: What contract term? (1 year, 3 year)
      variable: Topic.contractTerm

tools.name: Dynamics 365 CRM
tools.description: Pulls customer account history, open opportunities, and contact information

tools.name: SharePoint Sales Library
tools.description: Searches product sheets, case studies, competitive analysis docs, and pricing guides

tools.name: Word Online
tools.description: Generates formatted proposal documents from templates

powerAutomateFlows.name: Generate Proposal Draft
powerAutomateFlows.description: Assembles a proposal document from template, pulling in customer-specific data, recommended products, and case studies
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Automates the most time-consuming part of proposal creation

powerAutomateFlows.name: Search SharePoint Case Studies
powerAutomateFlows.description: Queries the SharePoint case study library filtered by industry, product, and deal size
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Finds the most relevant customer references for the proposal

powerAutomateFlows.name: Manager Approval Request
powerAutomateFlows.description: Routes proposals over $100k for manager review and approval via Teams adaptive card
powerAutomateFlows.purpose: Enforces pricing approval policies while keeping the workflow fast

additionalSections.title: Prerequisites
additionalSections.content:
1. Dynamics 365 Sales with API access
2. SharePoint site with organized sales content library
3. Word Online proposal templates
4. Sales team members added to the Copilot Studio environment

additionalSections.title: Customization Guide
additionalSections.content:
- Update pricing tiers in the SharePoint pricing guide document quarterly
- Add new case studies to the /CaseStudies library with proper metadata tags
- Modify the Word template at /Templates/ProposalTemplate.docx for branding changes
- Adjust the $100k approval threshold in the Manager Approval flow
